title: Voxy Vivecraft 1.20.1 Backport Feasibility
public_snippet_redacted: Requester wants a 1.20.1 Voxy backport that works with Vivecraft and shaders, says they would pay/reimburse a reasonable cost, and links follow-up VR performance comparison material. Related issue #375 says maintainers have treated 1.20.1 as not planned.
blueprint_angle: A $100 feasibility diagnostic for a possible Voxy 1.20.1 Vivecraft/shader backport, not a promise of a full mod port.
risk_boundary: No private modpack files, paid mod jars, server credentials, account credentials, player data, private recordings, Forge/full-backport guarantee, performance guarantee, or upstream public posting without explicit approval.
acceptance_statement: I accept the Voxy VR Backport Feasibility Sprint fixed-scope terms at $100. I understand work starts only after seller-owned external payment proof exists; I will provide only public or buyer-authorized non-sensitive version targets, modpack context, and reproduction details; the deliverable is limited to a public-safe backport feasibility report, dependency/version matrix, Vivecraft/Iris/Sodium risk map, first-test checklist, and recommended milestone plan; and a working 1.20.1 build, Forge port, private modpack debugging, paid mod jars, production server access, guaranteed upstream acceptance, performance guarantee, ongoing support, or extra revisions are not included unless separately agreed before payment.
response_draft_not_posted: I saw this Voxy 1.20.1 Vivecraft/shader backport request and can offer a narrow first-pass feasibility sprint for $100. I would not promise a full backport up front. The deliverable would be a public-safe version/dependency matrix, Vivecraft/Iris/Sodium risk map, first-test checklist, and milestone plan based on the current public dev branch and the requested 1.20.1 VR target. I would not need private modpack files, paid jars, server access, account credentials, or private recordings; any upstream comment or PR would require explicit approval.
posting_boundary: Draft response prepared only. External public comments, direct messages, pull requests, or form submissions require explicit send approval.
money_rule: Count $0 until real buyer acceptance, seller-owned external payment proof, delivery proof, and posted/released/payable/cleared funds exist.
